title: 菊花賞の後に・エデンへ至るヒント

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's chillax strategy proves effective, and
she delivers a performance for the ages! But what
will stoke her competitive fire now?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Gold Ship prepares to start a life working
the land, Eishin Flash challenges her to a battle in
the upcoming Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's more, she'll throw in a new clue from the
Book of Secrets if Gold Ship accepts the
challenge! It's a deal that can't be beat, and just
like that, Gold Ship is back in action!
